docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY WOLDEZGI, HEDRU AS TO DEFENDANT MOHAMMED, MYRNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOLDEZGI, HEDRU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOHAMMED, MYRNA $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (1 PAGE) ROA PAID BY DEFENDANT MOHAMMED, MYRNA
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFER FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT MOHAMMED, MYRNA TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT WOLDEZGI, HEDRU JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF APPELLANT MYRNA MOHAMMED AND AGAINST RESPONDENT HEDRU WOLDEZGI IN THE AMOUNT OF: $0.00. THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF DID NOT MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF THAT (1) DEFENDANT CAUSED THE DAMAGES CLAIMED, OR THE AMOUNT OF DAMAGES, OR (2) DEFENDANT OWES PLAINTIFF BACK RENT. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-23-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, July 23, 2015 in Department 525:
Hedru Woldezgi, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona with witness/translator/daughter Feven Herdru Woldezgi, and witness/wife AlganeshKetema.
Arthur S. Gaus, Esq. (phone 415-397-2700), specially appearance counsel for Appellant/Defendant Myrna Mohammed who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn. Plaintiff/Respondent, Hedru Woldezgi testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The clerk administers the interpreter's oath to Feven Herdru Woldezgi to translate the English language into Tigrigna language and vice versa and Feven Herdru Woldezgi testifies on behalf of Respondent.
The following documentary evidence is introduced: Exhibits Not Marked - video taping of water dripping in the house on cell phone shown to the Court and to Appellant's Counsel, print out pictures, request for tenancy approval from section 8, 10/05/2014 last payment receipt, 5/31/15 letter of water department & police department.

Counsel Arthur Gaus testifies on behalf of appellant.
Myrna Mohammed testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court.
The following documentary evidence is introduced: Exhibits Not Marked - rent agreement, tenancy approval, rent receipts, water leakage photos, orders from section 8 to fix water dripping, and department of authority report.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly unmarked evidence returned to the parties by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Jeffrey Wohl; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-15-2015 Judgment Entered
